_comment: Prompt style library, deep-merged over built-in defaults (src/zymera/prompts.py). Add your own styles here; each may define prefix, suffix, and negative.

natural_light_portrait.suffix: , golden hour sunlight, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, 50mm lens, authentic expression
natural_light_portrait.negative: cartoon, anime, 3d render, studio lighting, posed, stiff

product_lifestyle.suffix: , bright airy interior, natural window light, commercial photography, clean composition
